mdSummary:
# Mention

Textarea with @-trigger dropdown for mentioning users.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Forms/Selection
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/mention

## Parameters

|---|---|---|---|---|
| Mention | FormField | `FormField.FormFieldContext?` | `` |  |
| Mention | Value | `string?` | `` |  |
| Mention | ValueChanged | `EventCallback<string>` | `` |  |
| Mention | Trigger | `char` | `'@'` |  |
| Mention | Options | `List<MentionOption>` | `[]` |  |
| Mention | OnSearch | `EventCallback<string>` | `` |  |
| Mention | Disabled | `bool` | `` |  |
| Mention | Placeholder | `string?` | `` |  |
| Mention | Rows | `int` | `3` |  |
| Mention | Required | `bool` | `` |  |
| Mention | Invalid | `bool` | `` |  |
| Mention | ErrorText | `string?` | `` |  |
| Mention | HelperText | `string?` | `` |  |
| Mention | Label | `string?` | `` |  |
| Mention | Name | `string?` | `` |  |
| Mention | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| Mention | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
